text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Add usage repository methods and API endpoints","description":"Add getTimeseries(days) and getByProviderAggregated(since) to src/db/repositories/usage.js. Add GET /api/usage/timeseries and GET /api/usage/by-provider endpoints to src/router/app.js. Add POST /api/accounts/backup endpoint to src/router/app.js. Add usageTimeseries(), usageByProvider(), backupKeys() to src/dashboard/src/lib/api.js. Also modify src/email/mailer.js to accept attachments parameter.","assignedBy":"backend-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:39:57.907Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"6","subject":"Create PDF report generator and email integration","description":"1. Add pdfkit dependency to package.json
2. Create src/email/pdf-report.js with PdfReportGenerator class:
   - constructor(db, logger)
   - async generateDaily() → Buffer
   - Page 1: Executive summary (date range, total requests, cost, savings, "vs OpenAI" comparison)
   - Page 2: Provider breakdown (table: provider, requests, tokens, cost, avg latency; pie chart)
   - Page 3: Model usage details (top 10 models, free tier utilization %)
3. Modify src/email/digest.js buildDaily():
   - After building HTML digest, also generate PDF
   - Return { subject, html, attachments: [{ filename, content }] }
4. Modify src/email/mailer.js send():
   - Accept optional attachments parameter
   - Pass to nodemailer.sendMail({ attachments })
5. Modify src/email/scheduler.js sendDigest():
   - Pass attachments from digest to mailer

Note: mailer.js attachment support will be added in task 1. This task adds pdfkit, creates the generator, and integrates with digest/scheduler.","assignedBy":"backend-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:40:58.646Z"}
